payload.description: Coronavirus Response and Relief Supplemental Appropriations Act

tool_args.label: COVID-19 Omicron impact on February passenger revenue
tool_args.raw_text: The effects of the COVID-19 Omicron variant continued to impact subway, bus and commuter rail ridership in February which resulted in Passenger revenue underrunning the Adopted Budget forecast by $56 million, or 18%.

payload.claim_text: The effects of the COVID-19 Omicron variant continued to impact subway, bus and commuter rail ridership in February which resulted in Passenger revenue underrunning the Adopted Budget forecast by $56 million, or 18%.

tool_args.label: Operating expenses favorable YTD
tool_args.raw_text: Operating expenses through February were favorable by $181 million (7%), mainly in materials, professional services, maintenance-related contracts, paratransit costs, and health & welfare/OPEB expenses, as well as vacancy savings.

payload.claim_text: Operating expenses through February were favorable by $181 million (7%), mainly in materials, professional services, maintenance-related contracts, paratransit costs, and health & welfare/OPEB expenses, as well as vacancy savings.

tool_args.label: Subsidy receipts favorable through March
tool_args.raw_text: Overall subsidy receipts dedicated for operating purposes through March were $166 million (16%) favorable.

payload.claim_text: Overall subsidy receipts dedicated for operating purposes through March were $166 million (16%) favorable.

tool_args.label: NYC Total Employment January 2022
tool_args.raw_text: NYC Employment Preliminary Jan-22: 4,357.6 thousand, Revised Dec-21: 4,448.8 thousand, Jan-21: 4,044.8 thousand

tool_args.label: NYC Employment Year-over-Year Change January 2022
tool_args.raw_text: NYC Employment Jan-22 vs Jan-21: Net +312.8 thousand, Pct +7.7%

tool_args.label: Crude Oil Spot Price March 14, 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Crude Oil WTI Latest Price as of 3/14/22: $103.22/bbl, Feb-22: $91.64, Jan-22: $83.22, Feb-21: $59.04

tool_args.label: Regional CPI-U February 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Regional CPI-U: Feb-22 301.15, Jan-22 300.16, Feb-21 286.47; Feb-22 vs Feb-21 +5.1%

tool_args.label: Passenger revenues significantly below pre-pandemic levels
tool_args.raw_text: Passenger revenues for February remain significantly below pre-pandemic levels and compared with 2019, with passenger revenues down $443 million (47%).

payload.claim_text: Passenger revenues for February remain significantly below pre-pandemic levels and compared with 2019, with passenger revenues down $443 million (47%).

tool_args.label: Cause of passenger revenue shortfall
tool_args.raw_text: Passenger revenues for the month and YTD were worse than budget primarily due to lower ridership on Subways, Buses and the Commuter Railroads, mainly due to the impacts of the COVID-19 Omicron variant.

payload.claim_text: Passenger revenues for the month and YTD were worse than budget primarily due to lower ridership on Subways, Buses and the Commuter Railroads, mainly due to the impacts of the COVID-19 Omicron variant.

tool_args.label: Overtime overrun causes
tool_args.raw_text: The bulk of the overrun was at NYCT and reflects higher costs for vacancy/absentee coverage and severe weather response.

payload.claim_text: The bulk of the overrun was at NYCT and reflects higher costs for vacancy/absentee coverage and severe weather response.

tool_args.label: Kronos timekeeping outage note
tool_args.raw_text: Note: Due to the Kronos timekeeping outage, overtime spending figures may need to be revised.

payload.claim_text: Due to the Kronos timekeeping outage, overtime spending figures may need to be revised.

tool_args.label: Kronos timekeeping outage may affect overtime data
tool_args.raw_text: Due to the Kronos timekeeping outage, overtime spending figures may need to be revised.

payload.missing_information: Overtime spending figures may need revision due to Kronos timekeeping outage
